summary: Frontend verification of 3 product-gap fixes (mixed-breed chips, Hydrotherapy+Dog Walker in NearMe, Care specialist vets + auto-router). 2 of 3 fixes fully landed. Fix 2 is only partially landed — Go NearMe updates never reach the UI because /go route only uses GoSoulPage, which does not import/render GoNearMe.jsx.

ui_bugs.issue: GoSoulPage does NOT import or render GoNearMe.jsx. The updated SEARCH_TYPES in /app/frontend/src/components/go/GoNearMe.jsx (which now include 'Dog Walker' and 'Hydrotherapy') are effectively dead code because /go (the only Go route in App.js) maps to GoSoulPage and its 'Find & Stay' tab shows a different Stay-finder — not GoNearMe. Verified on BOTH desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports: 'Dog Walker' and 'Hydrotherapy' strings are NOT present in the /go DOM on any tab.

verified_working.FIX_1_breed_chips: PASS — MiraMeetsYourPet mobile (/pet-soul-onboard): data-testid='breed-popular-chips' rendered above search input with chips: 'Indian Pariah Dog (Indie)', '✨ Indie Mix', '✨ Labrador Mix', '✨ Golden Retriever Mix', '✨ Mixed Breed / Other'. Amber/orange accent styling applied on mix chips. Screenshot: mm_breedstep.png.
verified_working.FIX_2_play_nearme: PASS — /play → Find Play tab on BOTH desktop and mobile shows 'Dog Walkers' + 'Hydrotherapy' chips along with Dog Parks, Beaches, Agility, Swimming.
verified_working.FIX_3_care_specialist_chips: PASS — /care → Find Care tab on BOTH desktop and mobile renders 6 general pills (Grooming, Vet Clinic, Pet Spa, Dog Walker, Daycare, Boarding) then '✦ SPECIALIST VETS — FOR SURGERY OR SERIOUS CONDITIONS' label, then 5 red/rose specialist pills (Orthopaedic, Oncologist, Dermatologist, Ophthalmologist, Cardiologist). data-testid='care-specialist-types' + data-testid='care-type-{id}' all present.
verified_working.FIX_3_auto_router: PASS — Tested 5 keyword phrases, each correctly auto-switches the active type with red background (rgb(185,28,28) / #B91C1C) highlight: 'my dog needs surgery' → orthopaedic; 'lump on her belly' → oncologist; 'itchy skin' → dermatologist; 'eye cloudy' → ophthalmologist; 'heart murmur' → cardiologist.
verified_working.FIX_3_regression_general_types: PASS — General pills Grooming, Vet Clinic, Pet Spa, Dog Walker, Daycare, Boarding remain clickable with forest-green selection state.

action_items: FIX 2 Go pillar: wire GoNearMe.jsx (or equivalent Walker/Hydrotherapy chips) into GoSoulPage.jsx so the updated SEARCH_TYPES actually render in the /go route on desktop AND mobile. Currently GoNearMe is imported ONLY by GoMobilePage, which has no route in App.js. Either (a) add a NearMe/Find & Stay sub-view that mounts <GoNearMe/> inside GoSoulPage, or (b) register a /go-mobile route to GoMobilePage and update navigation to use it on small viewports.
Verify the agent-to-agent note in review_request — it incorrectly claims 'GoMobilePage + GoSoulPage both import the SAME GoNearMe.jsx component'. grep shows only GoMobilePage imports it.
critical_code_review_comments: GoSoulPage is 2000+ lines — should be split into smaller modules for maintainability.
PlaySoulPage.jsx line 1333 shadows activeTab from earlier useState on line 859 (two activeTab states in same file). Rename one to avoid confusion during future edits.

CareNearMe.jsx and similar components use Emergent-style inline styles. The `[class*="error"]` detection pattern in testing will not work here — acceptable for this component but note for future error-state surfacing.

success_rate.frontend: 83% (5/6 sub-features fully pass; Go NearMe fails)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Login + navigate to /go, /play?tab=nearme or click Find Play tab, /care?tab=nearme or click Find Care tab. Mobile uses same routes (/care, /play, /go) — CareMobilePage/PlayMobilePage/GoMobilePage exist as components but /care-mobile, /play-mobile, /go-mobile routes are NOT defined in App.js. Care specialist auto-router is verified working for 5 keyword phrases. Only outstanding issue: Go NearMe integration.
rca_of_issue: Go pillar fix incomplete: File /app/frontend/src/components/go/GoNearMe.jsx correctly has 'walker' and 'hydro' entries in SEARCH_TYPES (lines 17, 22), but /app/frontend/src/pages/GoSoulPage.jsx never imports or renders this component. Grep confirms: `grep -rn "GoNearMe" /app/frontend/src/pages/` returns only GoMobilePage.jsx. App.js routes /go → GoSoulPage only (no GoMobilePage route). Therefore the Hydrotherapy/Dog Walker chips exist in code but never reach the browser for either desktop or mobile users on /go.
